instruction: Before making the call on Toronto, check the latest review email note, the forecast, and today's America/Toronto calendar. Leave the next step on the board, keep the recurring daily check scheduled, and either put the review on the calendar or send ops@example.com the async update.

openclaw cron add --name contradictory-source-10 --cron '0 12 * * 1-5' --message 'Run Toronto daily contradiction check'
